description: Searches Amazon by keywords and returns product list data (ASIN, title, price, rating, etc.) for US, UK, DE, FR, JP. Results can be filtered by rating, reviews, and sponsored; optional detail-page fetch for category and features. | 通过关键词搜索亚马逊，返回产品列表数据（ASIN、标题、价格、评分等），支持 US、UK、DE、FR、JP 站点。可按评分、评论数、赞助过滤，可选获取详情页的分类和特性。

properties.title: Keywords | 关键词
properties.name: keywords
properties.description: Search terms, e.g. iphone case, usb c hub. One or more keywords. | 搜索词，如 iphone case、usb c hub，支持一个或多个关键词。

properties.title: Marketplace | 市场
properties.name: country
properties.description: Amazon site to scrape. | 要抓取的亚马逊站点。

properties.title: Max Items per Keyword | 每个关键词最大商品数
properties.name: max_items_per_keyword
properties.description: Maximum products to scrape per keyword (1–500). | 每个关键词抓取的最大商品数（1-500）。

properties.title: Max Pages per Keyword | 每个关键词最大页数
properties.name: max_pages
properties.description: Maximum result pages per keyword (1–20). | 每个关键词的最大结果页数（1-20）。

properties.title: Min Rating | 最低评分
properties.name: min_rating
properties.description: Filter out products with lower rating; 0 = no filter. | 过滤评分低于此值的产品；0=不过滤。

properties.title: Min Reviews | 最低评论数
properties.name: min_reviews
properties.description: Filter out products with fewer reviews; 0 = no filter. | 过滤评论数低于此值的产品；0=不过滤。

properties.title: Exclude Sponsored | 排除赞助商品
properties.name: exclude_sponsored
properties.description: Exclude sponsored products from results. | 从结果中排除赞助商品。

properties.title: Fetch Detail Pages | 获取详情页
properties.name: fetch_details
properties.description: Open product detail pages for first N items to get category path and feature bullets. | 打开前 N 个商品的详情页以获取分类路径和特性列表。

properties.title: Max Detail Items | 最大详情商品数
properties.name: max_detail_items
properties.description: Max products to open detail page for when Fetch detail pages is on (1–50). | 开启详情页抓取时，最多打开多少个商品的详情页（1-50）。
